patches_added.name: MicroG Support
patches_added.description: Redirects Play Integrity to microG-RE and prompts auto-install if missing.

patches_modified.name: Disable Android Privacy Sandbox Ad Services
patches_modified.description: Removes the AD_SERVICES_CONFIG property so Android Privacy Sandbox ad APIs (Topics, Attribution Reporting, Custom Audiences) are not opted into.

patches_modified.name: Disable AppsFlyer tracking
patches_modified.description: Neutralises the AppsFlyer attribution / tracking SDK. init() becomes a no-op and isStopped() always returns true, so no events, installs, uninstalls or attribution data are transmitted.

patches_modified.name: Disable Bugsnag crash tracking
patches_modified.description: Removes the Bugsnag API key metadata so the crash reporting SDK cannot initialize or upload telemetry.

patches_modified.name: Disable Google Ads SDK
patches_modified.description: Removes the Google Mobile Ads (AdMob) initialization metadata so the SDK never starts.

patches_modified.name: Disable Google Engage integration
patches_modified.description: Removes the Google Engage broadcast receiver so Pinterest cannot publish content recommendations back to Google (Discover, Assistant, Play Store, etc.).

patches_modified.name: Disable Google Engage worker
patches_modified.description: Rewrites GoogleEngageWorker.createWork() to return null so WorkManager fails the periodic job and no content recommendations are ever published to Google.

patches_modified.name: Hide ad views
patches_modified.description: Collapses Pinterest's ad-specific views (TextAdView, promoted closeup action bars, board sponsor headers, …) to zero-size on construction, so ad chrome never draws even if the feed adapter tries to render one.

patches_modified.name: Hide promoted pins
patches_modified.description: Neutralises every ad-indicator field on the Pinterest pin/story models (is_promoted, promoted_is_*, is_native, ad_data, ...) so Promoted Pins, shopping-carousel ads, native-content ads and click-out CTAs are never rendered or fired.

patches_modified.name: Opt out of Google Analytics
patches_modified.description: Sets the default Google Analytics consent flags to false so the Firebase Measurement SDK does not collect analytics, ad data or personalization signals.

patches_modified.name: Remove Advertising ID permission
patches_modified.description: Strips the com.google.android.gms.permission.AD_ID permission so any residual SDK cannot read the device's Google Advertising ID.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize copied links
patches_modified.description: Resolves Pinterest short URLs (pin.it/…, pinterest.com/url_shortener/…) to their canonical pin URL before they are placed on the system clipboard, so "Copy link" no longer produces a fingerprinted short link.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize sharing links
patches_modified.description: Strips UTM and click-ID tracking parameters from the URL the app puts on the Android share sheet, so friends receive clean pin links.

patches_modified.name: Disable Android Privacy Sandbox Ad Services
patches_modified.description: Removes the AD_SERVICES_CONFIG property so Android Privacy Sandbox ad APIs (Topics, Attribution Reporting, Custom Audiences) are not opted into.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks MyRadar's yearly premium features

patches_modified.name: Remove Watermark
patches_modified.description: Removes watermarks from Canva exports and previews.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks premium/lifetime featuers in app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlock all premium widgets.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks AiScore Premium Features in app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Premium features in app..

patches_modified.name: Unlock Lifetime
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all Lifetime features in Proxyman.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Premium features.

patches_modified.name: Alert Distances
patches_modified.description:
Configures radar/camera and hazard alert announcement distances.
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.

patches_modified.name: AutoZoom
patches_modified.description:
Controls how aggressively the map zooms in/out based on driving speed.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod

patches_modified.name: Disable Ads
patches_modified.description:
Suppresses all Waze ad systems via bundled preferences file:
• AdMob SDK (Ad_.*)
• Google Ads (Google_Ads.*)
• Ads Inventory Prediction
• ExternalPOI pins, coupons, popups (ExternalPO_ + Extern__POI both key variants)
• Search autocomplete server ads
Credits: Waze CGE Mod (ExternalPOI keys), Waze Chuppito (dual-key coverage).

patches_modified.name: Disable Advil Ad Requests
patches_modified.description: Stubs AdvilRequest.getPageUrl() → "" so the Advil ad server receives no page URL and returns no ad content.

patches_modified.name: Enlarged Speedometer
patches_modified.description: Increases speedometer digit size for better readability.

patches_modified.name: Map Skin (Vitamin C)
patches_modified.description:
Applies Chuppito's 'Vitamin C' map skin. All visual values configurable.
• Night: true black AMOLED background (saves battery, prevents burn-in)
• Day: warm beige background
• Larger font labels across the board
• Wider navigation arrow head for better visibility
• Custom car 3D models: Batmobile, Riddler, race car, 3D arrow
Credits: ALEX02-GTT (skin design), Waze Chuppito Mod (integration).

patches_modified.name: Navigation & Map
patches_modified.description:
Configures navigation and map behaviour:
• Nearing destination distance (Credits: CGE Mod)
• Android Auto head-up alert distances
• Map turn mode (auto-zoom to upcoming turn)
• Traffic bar minimum time threshold
• GPS icon visibility
• Route notifications (hazard, school zone) both disabled by default
Credits: Waze CGE Mod (nearing destination), Waze Chuppito (remaining keys).

patches_modified.name: Popup Suppression
patches_modified.description:
Prevents promotional and ad popups from appearing while driving.
Raises the minimum trigger speed to a near-impossible value so popups never appear.
Credits: Waze Chuppito Mod.

patches_modified.name: Radar Sound (Any Speed)
patches_modified.description: Plays radar/speed camera sound alerts regardless of current speed. Official Waze only alerts when over the speed limit.

patches_modified.name: Report Speed Limit
patches_modified.description: Adds a Report option when tapping the speedometer to report wrong or missing speed limits. Not available in the official version.

patches_modified.name: Speed Limit Sign
patches_modified.description: Sets the speed limit sign style shown on the map.

patches_modified.name: Uncensored Radar / Camera Display
patches_modified.description:
Shows exact fixed and mobile speed camera locations, including those not yet in the official Waze radar zone. Enables enforcement alerts via preferences keys:
Credits: Waze CGE Mod.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Elite
patches_modified.description: Unlocks JEFIT Elite features in app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock All Features
patches_modified.description: Bypasses PairIP DRM license check, removes all paywalls, and unlocks all premium features including cloud sync and remote access.

patches_modified.name: Unlock VIP (Lifetime)
patches_modified.description: Forces permanent professional VIP tier, removes ads and upgrade popups, bypasses PairIP.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlock premium features in app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks The Weather Channel's Premium and Premium Pro subscription tiers. Enables the ad-free experience, extended 15-day hourly forecast, real-feel temperature, air quality index, minute-by-minute precipitation, severe weather notifications, and radar overlays gated behind the subscription paywall.

patches_modified.name: Free in-app purchases
patches_modified.description: Bypasses Polytopia's purchase validation by patching the native IL2CPP library (libil2cpp.so). Makes IsProductUnlocked return true, skips the purchase flow, and suppresses the 'Purchase error' dialog. Pure hex patching, no smali, no extension.

patches_added.name: Remember repeat state
patches_added.description: Adds an option to remember the repeat state when playing a new track or playlist.

patches_added.name: Remember shuffle state
patches_added.description: Adds an option to remember the shuffle state when playing a new track or playlist.

patches_removed.name: Permanent repeat
patches_removed.description: Adds an option to always repeat even if the playlist ends or another track is played.

patches_added.name: Pin playlists (dev)
patches_added.description: Experimental YouTube Music 9.24.51, 9.25.50, and 9.26.51 patch that replaces Speed Dial pinning with persistent Library playlist pinning.

patches_removed.name: Pin playlists
patches_removed.description: Replaces Speed Dial pinning with persistent Library playlist pinning.

patches_modified.name: Pin playlists
patches_modified.description: Replaces Speed Dial pinning with persistent Library playlist pinning on YouTube Music 9.15.51.

patches_modified.name: Colorize comment indent lines
patches_modified.description: Replaces the default gray comment indent lines with color-coded lines.

patches_modified.name: Disable home feed auto-refresh
patches_modified.description: Disables the automatic refresh of the home feed after viewing a post or after being away from the app.

patches_modified.name: Disable home feed swipe
patches_modified.description: Disables the horizontal page swipe gesture used to switch feeds.

patches_modified.name: Disable home screen redirect
patches_modified.description: Disables the automatic redirect to the home screen after being away from the app or returning from the background.

patches_modified.name: Disable post detail swipe
patches_modified.description: Disables the horizontal swipe gesture used to navigate between posts.

patches_modified.name: Disable screenshot banner
patches_modified.description: Disables the banner that shows up after taking a screenshot.

patches_modified.name: Hide Ask button from search bar
patches_modified.description: Hides the Ask button (Reddit Answers) from the search bar.

patches_modified.name: Hide awards
patches_modified.description: Hides the awards on Reddit posts and comments.

patches_modified.name: Hide community highlights
patches_modified.description: Hides the community highlights section.

patches_modified.name: Hide post view counts
patches_modified.description: Removes the "views" indicator from the post metadata.

patches_modified.name: Hide prominent search bar
patches_modified.description: Hides the new prominent search bar on the main screen. Applicable only to version 2026.24.0 and earlier.

patches_modified.name: Hide share count
patches_modified.description: Hides the share count on Reddit posts.

patches_modified.name: Hide upvote scores
patches_modified.description: Hides the scores on Reddit posts and comments.

patches_modified.name: Hide user community badges
patches_modified.description: Hides the user community badges on Reddit comments.

patches_modified.name: Hide user flairs
patches_modified.description: Hides the user flairs on Reddit comments.

patches_modified.name: Open external links directly
patches_modified.description: Opens external links directly without going through out.reddit.com.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads and telemetry
patches_modified.description: Removes ads and telemetry everywhere.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize share links
patches_modified.description: Unshortens and removes the tracking query parameters from shared links.

patches_added.name: Beam of Death (10x Fire Rate)
patches_added.description: Multiplies the player's firing speed by 10 in the Bullet Hell minigame (fire interval 0.15 -> 0.015, and rapid-fire 0.1 -> 0.01) for a near-continuous beam.

patches_added.name: Redirect Google login to microG
patches_added.description: Routes Roost's Google Play Services calls to microG RE so a patched install can sign in with Google. Requires microG RE (app.revanced.android.gms) installed.

patches_added.name: Skip Play Integrity (fix microG Firebase delay)
patches_added.description: Makes Play Integrity attestation fail fast instead of hanging ~60s under microG, removing the delay before Firebase logins, leaderboards, and other backend calls.

patches_added.name: Beam of Death (10x Fire Rate)
patches_added.description: Multiplies the player's firing speed by 10 in the Bullet Hell minigame (fire interval 0.15 -> 0.015, and rapid-fire 0.1 -> 0.01) for a near-continuous beam.

patches_added.name: Redirect Google login to microG
patches_added.description: Routes Roost's Google Play Services calls to microG RE so a patched install can sign in with Google. Requires microG RE (app.revanced.android.gms) installed.

patches_added.name: Skip Play Integrity (fix microG Firebase delay)
patches_added.description: Makes Play Integrity attestation fail fast instead of hanging ~60s under microG, removing the delay before Firebase logins, leaderboards, and other backend calls.
